HarmonicConstituents.name: M2
HarmonicConstituents.comments: 365-day analysis from 3/2 to 9/29 2002.  Using verified hourly heights.  MM, MSF, and MF have been set to zero.  Sa and Ssa have been replaced with accepted set from Solomons Is (8577330), which are based upon 21 1-yr analyses (1983-2003).
